texto: This is one of the cruelties of the theatre of life
autor: we all think of ourselves as stars and rarely recognize it when we are indeed mere supporting characters or even supernumeraries.
explicacao: Citação de we all think of ourselves as stars and rarely recognize it when we are indeed mere supporting characters or even supernumeraries. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “This is one of the cruelties of the theatre of life” articula reflexao, robertson-davies, cruelties em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
